SEARCH
程序包 system

类 Job

java.lang.Object
system.Job
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class Job extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a TA job position in the TA Management System.

A Job contains all information about a teaching assistant position including the module details, workload hours, deadline, required skills, and application settings. Jobs are created by Module Organizers (MO) and can be applied for by Teaching Assistants (TA).

The class implements Serializable to support persistence via file storage.

从以下版本开始:
2026

    Constructs a new Job with skills.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Job

      public Job(String jobId, String moEmail, String moduleCode, String moduleName, String description, int weeklyHours, String deadline, String requirements, String status, int applicantLimit)
      Constructs a new Job without skills.

      Skills list is initialized as empty.

      参数:
      jobId - unique identifier for this job
      moEmail - email of the Module Organizer
      moduleCode - module code
      moduleName - full module name
      description - description of TA duties
      weeklyHours - weekly hours required
      deadline - application deadline
      requirements - requirements for applicants
      status - current status ("OPEN" or "CLOSED")
      applicantLimit - maximum number of applicants

    • Job

      public Job(String jobId, String moEmail, String moduleCode, String moduleName, String description, int weeklyHours, String deadline, String requirements, String status, int applicantLimit, List<String> skills)
      Constructs a new Job with skills.
      参数:
      jobId - unique identifier for this job
      moEmail - email of the Module Organizer
      moduleCode - module code
      moduleName - full module name
      description - description of TA duties
      weeklyHours - weekly hours required
      deadline - application deadline
      requirements - requirements for applicants
      status - current status ("OPEN" or "CLOSED")
      applicantLimit - maximum number of applicants
      skills - list of required skills (null-safe)

  • 方法详细资料

    • getJobId

      public String getJobId()
      Returns the unique job identifier.
      返回:
      the job ID

    • getMoEmail

      public String getMoEmail()
      Returns the Module Organizer's email.
      返回:
      the MO email

    • getModuleCode

      public String getModuleCode()
      Returns the module code.
      返回:
      the module code

    • getModuleName

      public String getModuleName()
      Returns the full module name.
      返回:
      the module name

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the job description.
      返回:
      the description

    • getWeeklyHours

      public int getWeeklyHours()
      Returns the weekly hours required.
      返回:
      the weekly hours

    • getDeadline

      public String getDeadline()
      Returns the application deadline.
      返回:
      the deadline string

    • getRequirements

      public String getRequirements()
      Returns the requirements.
      返回:
      the requirements string

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the current status.
      返回:
      "OPEN" or "CLOSED"

    • getApplicantLimit

      public int getApplicantLimit()
      Returns the applicant limit.
      返回:
      the maximum number of applicants

    • getSkills

      public List<String> getSkills()
      Returns the list of required skills.
      返回:
      the skills list (never null)

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the job status.
      参数:
      status - the new status ("OPEN" or "CLOSED")

    • setApplicantLimit

      public void setApplicantLimit(int applicantLimit)
      Sets the applicant limit.
      参数:
      applicantLimit - the new limit

    • setSkills

      public void setSkills(List<String> skills)
      Sets the required skills.
      参数:
      skills - the skills list (null-safe, converts null to empty list)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this job in CSV format.

      Format: jobId,moEmail,moduleCode,moduleName,description,weeklyHours, deadline,requirements,status,applicantLimit,skills

      Skills are joined with semicolons as delimiters.

      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the CSV string representation

    • fromString

      public static Job fromString(String line)
      Parses a CSV string to create a Job object.

      Supports lines with 9, 10, or 11 comma-separated fields. For 9 fields, applicantLimit defaults to 0. For 10 fields, skills defaults to empty list.

      参数:
      line - the CSV string to parse
      返回:
      the parsed Job, or null if the line format is invalid
